subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! God willing, mayest thou at all times act in accordance with that which hath been enjoined upon thee by the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا انشاء الله در کل احیان بما امرت به من لدی الرحمن عامل باشی و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Satan; the Evil One
